{{Quote|The Icarii will go to their doom, but your soldiers will pay in blood and tears for your victory!|Selestrine|<ref name="EOTE1">[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''Icarii Campaign''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] effort to subdue the native [[Icarii]] on [[Vestar/Legends|Vestar]]. It was led by the [[Lightning Battalion]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nim]] and [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Abal Karda]]. After months of vicious fighting, during which they witnessed the Icarii's unusual ability to remain alive after [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismemberment]], Lightning Battalion employed a horrific biological agent to eradicate the Icarii. The only surviving member of the species was [[Selestrine]], whose head was preserved in a [[kneeb]]hide casket and stolen by Karda when he fled Vestar.
